items.title: Jay-Z, Yankee Stadium, And How New York Grew Up With The Blueprint
items.summary: Toward the beginning of last Saturday’s brief rap god reunion, a noble Black woman once again saved me from myself. Or rather, from about nine shots of Espolon and a surge of fanboy euphoria. Moments beforehand, Eminem had emerged from the dark shadows of a Yankee Stadium tunnel to join Jay-Z to perform “Renegade” at HOV’s Blueprint 25th anniversary concert, and I'd unsheathed my iPhone 15 and started filming the moment.

items.title: The 5 Best Songs Of The Week
items.summary: Every week the Stereogum staff chooses the five best new songs of the week. The eligibility period begins and ends Thursdays right before midnight. You can hear this week’s picks below and on Stereogum’s Favorite New Music Spotify playlist, which is updated weekly.

items.title: Fenne Lily – “Thank You Sorry”
items.summary: You like really intense lyrics about post-breakup epiphanies? Well, here's one for you: "You thank me for a good year and go/ And you say it like you have to leave/ You're sorry for the good parts, as well as what you really did wrong/ But it's all the same to me." Those are the opening lines from the British-born, Brooklyn-based singer-songwriter Fenne Lily's new song "Thank You Sorry." She gets right to it!
